description:
Foundation for the CLI display overhaul. All human-facing commands route through this module; JSON paths bypass.

Surface:
  fn use_color() -> bool        // NO_COLOR, CLICOLOR, isatty, --plain
  fn use_unicode() -> bool      // same detection, separate toggle
  fn prio_dot(p: u8) -> StyledString
  fn status_glyph(s: &Status) -> &'static str
  fn status_word(s: &Status) -> ColoredStr       // colored label
  fn claimed_badge(t: &Task, me: &str) -> &str
  fn deps_badge(t: &Task, all: &[Task]) -> &str
  fn gates_badge(t: &Task, all: &[Task]) -> &str
  fn tree_prefix(depth: usize, is_last: bool, ancestors: &[bool]) -> String

Pick one of owo-colors or anstream. Document the choice in the module.

Add a --plain global flag (on Cli) that forces disable. Threads through via a Display struct or OnceLock.

Tests:
- Glyph/word mapping round-trips for every Status variant including Unknown.
- NO_COLOR and CLICOLOR=0 disable color.
- Pipe-to-file disables color (assert_cmd + pty or env-override).
- --plain disables both color and unicode.
title: display.rs module: color detection, glyphs, tree primitives
